query:
SELECT 
  a.name,
  m.year,
  m.month,
  ROUND(m.arrUsd, 0) as arr_usd,
  m.demosTotal as demos,
  m.dialsTotal as dials
FROM monthly_metrics m
JOIN ae_profiles a ON m.aeId = a.id
WHERE a.isActive = 1
  AND (m.year = 2026 OR (m.year = 2025 AND m.month >= 10))
ORDER BY a.name, m.year, m.month;

SELECT a.name, COUNT(d.id) as deal_count, ROUND(SUM(d.arrUsd), 0) as total_arr_usd
FROM ae_profiles a
LEFT JOIN deals d ON d.aeId = a.id
WHERE a.isActive = 1
GROUP BY a.id, a.name;

FROM monthly_metrics m
JOIN ae_profiles a ON m.aeId = a.id
WHERE a.isActive = 1
  AND (m.year = 2026 OR (m.year = 2025 AND m.month >= 10))
ORDER BY a.name, m.year, m.month;

SELECT a.name, COUNT(d.id) as deal_count, ROUND(SUM(d.arrUsd), 0) as total_arr_usd
FROM ae_profiles a
LEFT JOIN deals d ON d.aeId = a.id
WHERE a.isActive = 1
GROUP BY a.id, a.name;
